MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Quieting Title of Real Property Hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge Thomas Mellon, Jr., Clerk: V. Mack/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Bob Balian.
Andrew Schwartz, Esq. for Plaintiff: Alice Crowley, Trustee of the Emmet W. Loftus Qtip Subtrust, and John L. Gieseker and William J. Gieseker, Trustees of the Charles H. Gieseker and Margaret M. Gieseker Revocable Trust.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: All Persons claiming any interest in, or lien upon the subject real property. See scanned doc. for details of judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
